verification_commands: jq '{evidence_rows, request_rows, post_label_analysis, evidence_status_counts, action_evidence_forbidden_key_count, terminal_commit_rows, gate, diagnostic_conclusion, paper_claim_allowed}' local_dataset/runs/h001_expanded_retrieval_goal_validity_object_relation_evidence_v1/goal_validity_object_relation_evidence_summary.json

jq -s '{rows:length, evidence_status:(map(.evidence_status) | group_by(.) | map({(.[0]):length}) | add), next_actions:(map(.next_evidence_action) | group_by(.) | map({(.[0]):length}) | add)}' local_dataset/runs/h001_expanded_retrieval_goal_validity_object_relation_evidence_v1/goal_validity_object_relation_request_rows.jsonl

jq -s '{rows:length, candidate_correct:(map(.evaluation_only_candidate_correct|tostring) | group_by(.) | map({(.[0]):length}) | add), interpretation:(map(.evaluation_only_interpretation) | group_by(.) | map({(.[0]):length}) | add)}' local_dataset/runs/h001_expanded_retrieval_goal_validity_object_relation_evidence_v1/goal_validity_object_relation_evaluated_rows.jsonl
